01About Me

I'm Khush Patel, a Computer Science student at Silver Oak University (2025-2029) and an active builder at CodingGita.

I build across domains — from production-grade Flutter desktop apps with Riverpod state management to Node.js backends, React frontends, and Python APIs. I love turning complex problems into elegant, user-friendly solutions.

When I'm not writing code, I'm exploring new technologies, joining hackathons, and collaborating with fellow developers.
